title: Rich Push Notifications
description: Implement rich push notifications with images and actions for chat messages.
instructions:
Extend the push notification system to support rich content:

1. Notification types to support:
   - Text messages: Show sender name and message preview
   - Images: Show thumbnail in notification
   - Group mentions: Highlight when you're mentioned
   - Reactions: Show 'User reacted 👍 to your message'

2. Notification actions:
   - Reply: Quick reply from notification (Android direct reply, iOS notification action)
   - Mark as read: Dismiss without opening app
   - Mute: Temporarily mute this conversation

3. Data payload handling:
   - Parse FCM data payload to extract message type and content
   - Show appropriate notification based on type
   - Handle tap actions (open specific chat, mark as read)

4. Group notifications:
   - Bundle multiple messages from same chat
   - Show '3 new messages from Chat Name'

Test on both Android and iOS platforms.

hints.text: Use flutter_local_notifications with proper notification channels for different types.
For iOS rich notifications, you'll need a Notification Service Extension to download images.
Use messagingStyle on Android for proper chat-style notifications with replies.
